title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 640.755 - Rulemaking, procedure — clean water commission to administer
text:
640.755.  Rulemaking, procedure — clean water commission to administer. — 1.  No rule or portion of a rule promulgated under the authority of sections 640.700 to 640.755 shall become effective unless it has been promulgated pursuant to the provisions of section 536.024.
  2.  Sections 640.700 to 640.755 shall be administered by the clean water commission pursuant to the provisions and requirements of chapter 644.
(L. 1996 H.B. 1207, A.L. 2001 H.B. 501)
